chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1533 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.6482/2023 3. For hearing of main case 28-11-2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Agha Ather Pathan, Assistant Advocate General a/w Nek Muhammad authorized person of respondents No.4,5 & 7.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ziaula Haque Advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No. 4, 5 and 7, which is taken on record. Petitioner being an employee of Town Committee Mehrabpur as a Pump operator, has filed this petition claiming adhoc relief allowed to civil servants of Government of Sindh, vide Notification dated 06.07.2023. Learned counsel for Town Committee Mehrabpur submits that the petitioner has already been given all the benefits as per law and since he is not a civil servant, therefore he is not entitled to benefits envisaged in the Notification dated 06.07.2023. More so, he has been found absent in performing duty and most of the time he remains off duty and since he has become disabled person, he is not able to perform his duty as pump operator. In any case, we refer the matter of the petitioner to respondents No.4 and 5 to determine and fix actual salary of the petitioner and any adhoc relief if he is entitled to in accordance with law and with the help and guidance of District Account Officer, Naushehro Feroze. This exercise shall be completed within two months. Accordingly this petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
